title: Revolve Group (RVLV) Q1 Earnings and Revenues Surpass Estimates
text: Revolve Group exceeded earnings expectations in Q1 2024 with diluted earnings per share of $0.15, beating the estimate of $0.08 by 87.5%. The company reported net sales of $270.6 million, representing a 3% year-over-year decline but missing estimates of $271.83 million by 0.6%. This mixed result reflected the challenging retail environment coupled with strong cost management. Gross margin expanded significantly to 52.3%, up 250 basis points year-over-year, driven by a higher mix of full-price sales and lower inventory valuation adjustments. Active customers grew 5% year-over-year to 2.55 million, demonstrating continued customer acquisition momentum. The company achieved net income of $10.9 million, up from $5.23 million in the prior year, reflecting operational leverage despite the revenue decline. Beauty category net sales grew 34% year-over-year, highlighting the success of adjacent category expansion initiatives. Management maintained confidence in the business fundamentals and strategic initiatives, including category expansion, international growth, and AI integration. For full-year 2024, the company projected gross margins between 52.5%-53.0%, reflecting expectations for continued full-price sales mix improvement.
